title: avenula marginata subsp. albinervis
intro: Avenula marginata subsp. albinervis, also known as Mountain Avens, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Avenula marginata subsp. albinervis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Mountain Avens include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
